positive: A symmetrical and intricate celestial mandala composed of glowing floral patterns and geometric constellations. The style is neo-art nouveau mixed with sacred geometry, featuring highly detailed linework, dotwork, and symmetrical repetition. The main subjects are stylized lunar flora and crystalline stardust forming a central, vibrant cluster. Color palette: deep midnight indigo and midnight blue background, contrasted sharply by vibrant neon magentas, electric cyans, and metallic golds. Composition must be centered, highly detailed, and designed to look like a clean screen-print vector illustration suitable for apparel. Perfect silhouette, strong contrast, bioluminescent effect, high resolution, flat vector graphic quality.
